name: Full Integration Simulation EN/FR
description: End-to-end simulation: Pearl monitoring, OBS scene switching, layout control, safe mode, rehearsal, full post-production pipeline. Designed to stress-test every integration point before a live event.

cues.label: Pre-Flight / System Check
cues.notes: Verify: Pearl channels 2 (EN) + 3 (FR) recording. OBS WebSocket Online in health panel. All thumbnails live. Run pre-flight from cockpit. Check Pearl Channels panel shows correct EN/FR assignments.

cues.label: Holding Slate
cues.notes: Switch OBS to 'Slate Scene'. Switch Pearl layout to 01 MA-Pre-Show-Loop. Verify OBS thumbnail updates in cockpit. Verify Scene Switcher highlights Slate Scene.

cues.label: Start YouTube Stream (OBS)
cues.notes: START STREAMING in OBS manually (Controls panel → Start Streaming). Verify stream goes live on YouTube unlisted. OBS health should now show streaming active.

cues.label: Intro
cues.notes: Switch OBS to 'Intro Scene'. Announce bilingual simulation start. Confirm OBS scene switch from cockpit works.

cues.label: Main Camera
cues.notes: Switch OBS to 'Main Camera'. Switch Pearl to layout 9 (02 Fullscreen Zoom EN w/ cover). Confirm both cockpit panels update.

cues.label: Rehearsal Mode Test
cues.notes: Enter Rehearsal Mode from cockpit. Switch Pearl layout. Exit Rehearsal. Verify action log entry created with timestamp.

cues.label: Sony Main Camera
cues.notes: Switch OBS to 'Sony_Main'. Test OBS scene switch from cockpit Scene Switcher. Verify Sony_Main highlighted as active.

cues.label: Sony PIP
cues.notes: Switch OBS to 'Sony_PIP'. Test picture-in-picture layout. Confirm cockpit updates.

cues.label: Emergency Stop Test
cues.notes: Trigger Emergency Stop from cockpit. Confirm SAFE MODE ACTIVE with timestamp. Verify action log entry. Resume within 10 seconds.

cues.label: Technical Difficulties Scene
cues.notes: Switch OBS to 'Technical Difficulties' scene. Test this fallback scene from cockpit. Switch Pearl back to layout 1.

cues.label: Closing — Camera Scene
cues.notes: Switch OBS to 'Camera Scene'. Switch Pearl back to 01 MA-Pre-Show-Loop. Final remarks for simulation.

cues.label: Stop YouTube Stream (OBS)
cues.notes: STOP STREAMING in OBS manually. Confirm stream ends on YouTube. OBS thumbnail will go offline.

cues.label: Stop Pearl Recording
cues.notes: STOP RECORDING on Pearl channels 2 and 3. This triggers the post-production pipeline automatically. Watch terminal for pipeline stages starting.

cues.label: Monitor Post-Production Pipeline
cues.notes: Watch terminal: backup_verify → youtube_en → audio_extract → translate → transcript → youtube_fr → file_rename → report. Verify all 7 output files in data/sessions/FullSim-001_001/
